Place partner and brand images used by the site in this folder:

  forun-logo.png
  prometric.png
  pearson-vue.png
  celpip.jpg
  cma-usa.png
  psi.png

The app references these paths as /images/logos/<filename> (served from public/images/logos/).

If files are missing, the build still succeeds; broken images appear until you add assets.
